title: poa glauca var. kitadakensis
intro: Poa glauca var. kitadakensis, also known as Kitadake blue grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to Japan and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and boosting the immune system. Poa glauca var. kitadakensis can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional Japanese herbal medicine.
